perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator wearing a white t-shirt stands in a bright indoor kitchen, introducing a motorized fruit peeling machine. She pours green grapes into a clear cylindrical device. (2) The device spins rapidly, and the scene cuts to reveal perfectly peeled grapes in a small bowl. (3) The creator introduces a mini hand-held mop, demonstrating its use on a black induction cooktop and then rinsing/squeezing it over a kitchen sink. (4) She introduces a metal kebab rack for an air fryer, assembles meat and vegetable skewers, and cooks them; she is then shown eating a finished skewer. (5) She concludes by gesturing towards the products on the counter, with graphic overlays indicating her final recommendations.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese. (2) Sounds of a mechanical motor whirring are heard during the grape peeling sequence. (3) Water splashing and mechanical clicking sounds occur as the mini mop is demonstrated and squeezed. (4) Audio includes the sound of biting and chewing during the kebab tasting. (5) The music continues at a steady tempo until a final variety-show style 'ding' sound effect marks the conclusion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: 【無用小廢物實測】 (Testing Useless Little Items) appears at the top throughout. (2) Functional: 1. 水果削皮機 (1. Fruit Peeling Machine) with subtext '1號選手：葡萄' (Contestant No. 1: Grape). (3) Hook: 完全去皮!!! (Completely peeled!!!) with a heart-eye emoji. (4) Functional: 2. 迷你小拖把 (2. Mini Mop) and '見證奇蹟的時刻' (Moment of witnessing a miracle). (5) Decorative: 不實用 (Not practical) with a cartoon bear icon. (6) Functional: 3. 氣炸鍋串烤架 (3. Air Fryer Kebab Rack) and '出爐囉' (Out of the oven). (7) Decorative: 推薦 (Recommended) marked with green checkmarks for the peeler and rack.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Consecutive product testing (Peeler, Mop, Rack) -> Final verdict summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator present on screen throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a pink and white logo on the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern white kitchen with tiled walls, a sink, an induction cooktop, and various kitchen utensils visible on the counter.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Review 1 -> Product Review 2 -> Product Review 3 -> Final Recommendations
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain viewers while reviewing niche or 'useless' household gadgets, providing a hands-on demonstration and personal verdict on their practical value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on testing 'useless' items with a critical tone for one of them, suggesting an organic review rather than a paid placement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of variety-show style emojis and reactive bear stickers to emphasize disapproval.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-speed editing and constant verbal engagement to maintain viewer retention in a short-form format.
